name: team_task_add_dependency
description: Add a dependency relationship between two tasks, indicating that one task must be completed before another can begin. The specified task will depend on the completion of the depends_on_id task. Circular dependencies are detected and rejected. Use this to enforce execution ordering in the team's task workflow.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task that will be blocked until the dependency is completed

depends_on_id.description: Unique identifier of the task that must be completed first

examples.name: Make integration tests depend on unit tests
Make deployment depend on code review
